### Self-test meta-skill enforces preamble invocation

Self-test meta-skill must verify every skill references `skills/_shared/resolve-paths.md` as its config-resolution entry point, preventing future skills from silently bypassing schema validation. Source: docs/specs/jim/012-config-adherence/security.md finding 5.

### Self-test meta-skill enforces schema value constraints

Self-test meta-skill must verify that every new `path.*` key added to `skills/_shared/config-schema.md` carries value constraints (relative path, no `..`, no leading `/`, resolved within project root), preventing silent weakening of validation over time. Source: docs/specs/jim/012-config-adherence/security.md finding 4.
